hooks.command: files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -E '^src/'); if [ -z "$files" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo 'Staged src files detected, running lint:fix...' >&2; npm run lint:fix || exit 2; echo "$files" | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 git add
hooks.statusMessage: Linting staged src files before commit...
